## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Aron's background, recent experiences, and potential collaboration opportunities with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aron has specialized expertise in scaling B2B dev tools from 0 to $10M, combining strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [He's exploring new ways to leverage his skills, potentially through consulting or fractional roles](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Aron sees an opportunity for startups to grow revenue lean, potentially outsourcing certain GTM functions](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Recent departure from Unstructured due to company-wide reduction in force, despite positive growth trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Aron's Professional Background

  - [3 years living in Hawaii, maintaining West Coast work hours (4:30 AM start)](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Career shift from consumer advertising to B2B tech via Digital Telepathy](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Worked on New Relic account ($100k/mo), joined in-house pre-IPO](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Recent roles: entering companies late in GTM development, establishing product-market fit and repeatable motions](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Specialization: Dev tools, commercial motion in mid-market/enterprise, 0-$10M ARR range](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### Current Career Exploration

  - [Seeking to apply learnings to help clients earlier in their journey](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Considering alternatives to traditional in-house roles](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

  - [Exploring lean GTM approaches, potentially with outsourced functions](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

  - [Left due to company-wide reduction in force (GTM, R\&D, core open source team)](https://fathom.video/share/KgzpynDrz3ouZpS3AdkBw9-sHhFf1-Rj?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Industry Observations
